indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: The couch is not suitable for computer work as it lacks a flat surface and is not ergonomically designed for prolonged use.

indicators.name: low flat surface coffee table
indicators.rationale: The coffee table is too low to serve as a flat work surface for a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no dedicated flat surface at sitting height for a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for extended use.

indicators.name: no dedicated workspace layout
indicators.rationale: The layout does not support a dedicated workspace for computer work.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no task lighting to reduce eye strain and provide good visibility for screen work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While there is a flat surface available, it is too low for ergonomic use, and there is no dedicated workspace layout or ergonomic seating. The absence of task lighting further undermines the suitability for focused solo work.
